response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for the chorus of 'Lifetime Showtime', but the video includes verses not present in the Reference JSON; I used on-screen burnt-in lyrics to transcribe these missing sections. 2. The video contains a mix of singing and dialogue. 3. Subtitles are tightly wrapped to vocal bursts, splitting blocks during pauses and transitions between characters. 4. English translations for Japanese dialogue are contextually adapted for tone and semantic continuity.

subtitles.original: Bouta burst, fluff & fuzz, we're meant to be free
subtitles.english: Bouta burst, fluff & fuzz, we're meant to be free

subtitles.original: Make a break for it, it's playtime!
subtitles.english: Make a break for it, it's playtime!

subtitles.original: I'm hitting the pavement, dreams sparklin' within our eyes
subtitles.english: I'm hitting the pavement, dreams sparklin' within our eyes

subtitles.original: Gonna keep you smilin', but my seconds won't stop flyin' by
subtitles.english: Gonna keep you smilin', but my seconds won't stop flyin' by

subtitles.original: Even though we're still just a pair of scaredy puppy dogs
subtitles.english: Even though we're still just a pair of scaredy puppy dogs

subtitles.original: The bond that we share as twins is irreplaceable
subtitles.english: The bond that we share as twins is irreplaceable

subtitles.original: Good times and bad times, it doesn't matter
subtitles.english: Good times and bad times, it doesn't matter

subtitles.original: Twin demon guard dog sisters, yeah! BAU!
subtitles.english: Twin demon guard dog sisters, yeah! BAU!

subtitles.original: And suddenly you'll come to realize
subtitles.english: And suddenly you'll come to realize

subtitles.original: There's as many as there are stars
subtitles.english: There's as many as there are stars

subtitles.original: We don't know if they all can be achieved
subtitles.english: We don't know if they all can be achieved

subtitles.original: But we'll keep on going furr-ever
subtitles.english: But we'll keep on going furr-ever
I want to be with you

subtitles.original: It's showtime 一緒にいたい
subtitles.english: It's showtime, I want to be with you

subtitles.original: It's showtime 一緒にいたいよ
subtitles.english: It's showtime, I want to be with you

subtitles.original: Fuwa fuwa Moco moco hand in hand with you
subtitles.english: Fuwa fuwa Moco moco hand in hand with you

subtitles.original: Bring your smile, rain or shine
subtitles.english: Bring your smile, rain or shine

subtitles.original: We'll protect it, won't forget our pledge to you!
subtitles.english: We'll protect it, won't forget our pledge to you!
I want to be with you

subtitles.original: Stars wink, moon spotlight, furr-ever glow
subtitles.english: Stars wink, moon spotlight, furr-ever glow
I want to be with you

subtitles.original: FUWAMOCO BAU BAU! FUWAMOCO BAU BAU!
subtitles.english: FUWAMOCO BAU BAU! FUWAMOCO BAU BAU!

subtitles.original: Welcome to our FUWAMOCO Wacha Wacha Birthday Festival!
subtitles.english: Welcome to our FUWAMOCO Wacha Wacha Birthday Festival!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for coming to celebrate our birthday with us!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to celebrate our birthday with us!

subtitles.original: わー！始まりました！わー！
今日は生誕ライブに来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for coming to our birthday live today!

subtitles.original: Well, to continue off from yesterday's variety show,
subtitles.english: Well, to continue off from yesterday's variety show,

subtitles.original: tonight again, today we have a big concert!
subtitles.english: tonight again, today we have a big concert!

subtitles.original: And can you believe it? It's already been three years!
subtitles.english: And can you believe it? It's already been three years!

subtitles.original: Right, our third birthday in Hololive!
subtitles.english: Right, our third birthday in Hololive!

subtitles.original: Thank you! But Mococo-chan, we can't forget that really important thing, right?
subtitles.english: Thank you! But Mococo-chan, we can't forget that really important thing, right?

subtitles.original: I'm not a chihuahua, I'm Fuwawa!
subtitles.english: I'm not a chihuahua, I'm Fuwawa!

subtitles.original: We're Hololive English -Advent- twin demon guard dog sisters!
subtitles.english: We're Hololive English -Advent- twin demon guard dog sisters!

subtitles.original: わー！そしてモコちゃん、
we have an amazing birthday festival stage here!
subtitles.english: we have an amazing birthday festival stage here!

subtitles.original: Amazing stage! Ruffians, so many of you!
subtitles.english: Amazing stage! Ruffians, so many of you!

subtitles.original: And such a big Ruffian too!
subtitles.english: And such a big Ruffian too!

subtitles.original: It's so big and wide too!
subtitles.english: It's so big and wide too!

subtitles.original: Thank you for being here today!
subtitles.english: Thank you for being here today!

subtitles.original: But, singing and dancing today is not just gonna be us, right?
subtitles.english: But, singing and dancing today is not just gonna be us, right?

subtitles.original: No, we're also here with some very special guests too!
subtitles.english: No, we're also here with some very special guests too!

subtitles.original: そう！今日はとっても素敵なゲストさんも来てるから、
subtitles.english: That's right! Since we have some very wonderful guests coming today,

subtitles.original: ぜひ楽しみにしててください！
subtitles.english: please stay tuned and look forward to it!

subtitles.original: そして、もう一人、謎のゲストさんも...
subtitles.english: And, there's one more mysterious guest...

subtitles.original: 誰かな？わっぴー！おっぴー！
subtitles.english: I wonder who it is? Wappie! Oppie!

subtitles.original: But, a birthday wouldn't be complete without this, right?
subtitles.english: But, a birthday wouldn't be complete without this, right?

subtitles.original: I think you know well, but...
subtitles.english: I think you know well, but...

subtitles.original: Right up here, you can see our birthday hashtag.
subtitles.english: Right up here, you can see our birthday hashtag.

subtitles.original: Please, please post your thoughts, take lots of photos, screenshots!
subtitles.english: Please, please post your thoughts, take lots of photos, screenshots!

subtitles.original: ぜひハッシュタグで感想呟いてください！写真もね！
subtitles.english: Please tweet your thoughts with the hashtag! Photos too!

subtitles.original: 後でポチしに行くからね！わっぴー！おっぴー！
subtitles.english: Because I'll go 'like' them later! Wappie! Oppie!

subtitles.original: We'll check all your thoughts after the show! Yeah! Bau Bau!
subtitles.english: We'll check all your thoughts after the show! Yeah! Bau Bau!
